title: Isomerism: optical
summary: 9701 A Level optical isomerism — chirality, enantiomers, and racemic mixtures with PhET molecule builder.

simpleExplanation.title: Mirror-image molecules
simpleExplanation.summary: A chiral carbon has four different groups. Enantiomers rotate plane-polarised light in opposite directions.
steps: Chiral centre — no plane of symmetry.
Racemic 50:50 mix — no net optical rotation.
Enzymes often bind one enantiomer only.

sections.content: **Optical isomerism** (29.4) follows **structural/stereoisomerism** (13.4). Mark * on chiral carbons and draw **3D wedges** when asked.
